name: shell-injection-regression
goal: Prove rendered params passed through command_argv are not interpreted by a shell.
command_argv: from pathlib import Path; import sys; out,text=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2]; Path('demo_out').mkdir(exist_ok=True); Path('demo_out', out).write_text(text + chr(10), encoding='utf-8')
gotchas: If this task creates workspace/PWNED, command rendering has regressed into shell execution.
